---
title: 'A moment of gratitude...'
date: '2021-01-30T07:14:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: false
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5563625531825560539'
blogger_filename: '/2021/01/a-moment-of-gratitude.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Musings'
---

<div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1611990873518758-0-10641c980c8f.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
    <img border="0"   src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1611990873518758-0-10641c980c8f.png" width="400">
  </a>
</div><br></div><div><br></div><div>In July 2020, I broke BOTH legs. I was confined to a wheelchair for two months and crutches for another month. How I longed to just stand up and walk to the kitchen, or, the toilet. God, bathroom trips were a whole new level of awkward.</div><div><br></div><div>I think of my friends who live with these chairs 24-7 and my heart goes out to them.</div><div><br></div><div>Today, I am thankful that for today, I can walk to the toilet.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>I keep my wheelchair as a desk chair now. It's convenient because I can roll around. But. It's a constant reminder of what I've been given back that I lost. Not everyone was so lucky.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>Father, I am grateful for your hand on my life, even when I could not see.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>Selah.</div><div><br></div><div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1611990860839118-1-4689f85d07c1.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
    <img border="0"   src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1611990860839118-1-4689f85d07c1.png" width="400">
  </a>
</div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div>
